name: 7.5' Full Virginia Pine Artificial Christmas Tree - Wondershop™
description:
Make your home or office decor look evergreen this holiday season with this Full Cashmere Artificial Christmas Tree from Wondershop™. This artificial Christmas tree with a dense and full appearance features green Virginia pine branches for a natural look. The decorative tree is easy to set up and includes a metal base for convenient placement throughout your home. Add ornaments and tree collar of your choice to complete the look.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
